arts.ttl: ‘Figures far from reality’ – Insistence finances will kill idea to sign Fulham player
arts.sum: Flamengo are considering signing Fulham’s Andreas Pereira, according to journalist Julio Miguel Neto. He took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to state Flamengo are looking to replace injured Giorgian De Arrascaeta with Pereira. Julio Miguel Neto says the Fulham player is ‘well regarded internally’ by the Brazilian club, who are monitoring his situation. The The post ‘Figures far from reality’ – Insistence finances will kill idea to sign Fulham player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “It was pretty close” – Fulham player reveals collapsed move to Tottenham
arts.sum: Fulham’s Joachim Andersen has revealed he came close to joining Tottenham Hotspur earlier in his career. The Denmark international has had a chat with Arbejdstitel about Tottenham interest and PL Bold have relayed his comments. Tottenham showed interest in the 28-year-old when he was on loan at Fulham from Lyon during the 2020/21 season. The The post “It was pretty close” – Fulham player reveals collapsed move to Tottenham appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta returns for FA Cup clash - as the Crystal Palace striker is set to be a hot property in this summer’s transfer market
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta will return for Crystal Palace tomorrow when they take on Premier League rivals Fulham for a place in the semi-finals of the FA Cup. Mateta, 27, missed out on Palace’s last Premier League clash – a 1-0 win over Ipswich – after needing 25 stitches to a severe laceration to his ear following a horrific challenge from Millwall keeper Liam Roberts in their last FA Cup round.

arts.ttl: Richards turns 25: Glasner, Palace & 'insane' hope for the season
arts.sum: It's Chris Richards' 25th birthday (28th March, 2025) – and whilst we wish him 'many happy returns' today, both he and Crystal Palace will be hoping the celebrations extend over multiple days!

arts.ttl: Saka could return to Arsenal squad against Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka could be named in the squad to face Fulham in the Premier League next week.

arts.ttl: West Ham transfer news: Vladimir Coufal confirms "great" Fulham offer, responds to Everton interest
arts.sum: West Ham United defender Vladimir Coufal opens up on transfer interest from fellow Premier League clubs Fulham and Everton.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Ben Chilwell lifts lid on exile, stance on Enzo Maresca's training decision
arts.sum: Ben Chilwell lifts the lid on his exile from the Chelsea squad since the start of the season, the defender now on loan at Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: “I feel I’ll get it soon” – Fulham manager Marco Silva wants European football
arts.sum: Fulham manager Marco Silva expressed his desire of managing a club in UEFA European competition, during a lengthy chat with Thursday’s edition of A Bola. Fulham are currently eighth in the Premier League table, three points behind fifth placed Manchester City and two behind sixth and seventh placed Newcastle United and Brighton & Hove Albion. The post “I feel I’ll get it soon” – Fulham manager Marco Silva wants European football appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: PL summer transfer window dates revealed - with Club World Cup twist
arts.sum: Premier League clubs have agreed on the 2025 summer transfer window dates following a shareholders' meeting in central London.
